categories.title: What {firstName} offers
categories.hint: One booking = one parcel from a single category. To send multiple parcels, make a booking per parcel.

reviews.title: What people say about {firstName}
reviews.empty: {firstName} has received {count, plural, =1 {# review} other {# reviews}} on Yamba. Visit their profile to read them in detail.
reviews.viewAll: View all {count, plural, =1 {# review} other {# reviews}}

cancellation.title: Cancellation policy
cancellation.full: Full refund up to 48h before the trip

prohibited.title: Prohibited items
prohibited.description: Illicit substances, weapons, cash, live animals, hazardous or flammable materials, counterfeits.

booking.comingSoonDescription: The booking system will launch very soon.

trust.noCharge: You won't be charged before accept request

notFound.title: Trip not found
notFound.description: This trip doesn''t exist or is no longer available.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: We couldn''t load this trip right now.
